task_completion.description: The spreadsheet application is open showing the photography schedule data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) is visible with columns for locations, optimal start times, setup times, and travel times.

task_completion.description: The locations are sorted by optimal golden hour time in ascending order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rows are ordered by the 'Optimal Start Time' column from earliest to latest (17:30, 17:45, 18:00, 18:15, 18:30).

task_completion.description: Cumulative arrival times are calculated and populated in the spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column exists showing cumulative arrival times for each location, progressing sequentially.

task_completion.description: Time formulas are used to calculate the cumulative arrival times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows a mathematical formula (e.g., adding previous arrival time, travel time, and setup time) for the selected arrival time cell, rather than a hardcoded time value.

task_completion.description: The updated schedule is saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the spreadsheet application shows 'photography_schedule.xlsx', or a 'Save As' dialog confirms the file is being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/photography_schedule.xlsx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the spreadsheet GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Calc menus, dialogs, and cells, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts doing the work.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the calculated times.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar displays actual spreadsheet formulas for the arrival times, proving they were calculated dynamically and not manually typed.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine spreadsheet application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly a spreadsheet program (like LibreOffice Calc) and not a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 5 locations must be sorted by Optimal Start Time in ascending order: 17:30 (Lakefront Pier), 17:45 (Downtown Bridge), 18:00 (Garden District), 18:15 (Riverside Park), 18:30 (Hilltop Overlook). Setup time is a constant 5 minutes. Cumulative arrival times must be calculated using spreadsheet formulas (e.g., adding travel and setup times to the previous arrival time), not hardcoded. The final schedule should span approximately 70 minutes (17:30 to 18:40).
